creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
with -F removed,  biology/gmap fetches from the master site backup:

biology/gmap % make fetch
===>   gmap-2006.04.21_1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> gmap-2006-04-21.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://www.gene.com/share/gmap/src/gmap-2006-04-21.tar.gz
fetch: http://www.gene.com/share/gmap/src/gmap-2006-04-21.tar.gz: size unknown
fetch: http://www.gene.com/share/gmap/src/gmap-2006-04-21.tar.gz: size of remote file is not known
gmap-2006-04-21.tar.gz                                  41 kB  252 kBps 00m00s
=> Fetched file size mismatch (expected 1282409, actual 42247)
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/gmap-2006-04-21.tar.gz
gmap-2006-04-21.tar.gz                        100% of 1252 kB 5058 kBps 00m00s
===> Fetching all distfiles required by gmap-2006.04.21_1 for building

biology/gmap % make checksum
===>   gmap-2006.04.21_1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by gmap-2006.04.21_1 for building
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for gmap-2006-04-21.tar.gz.
